data.summary_suggestion: Create a new environment variable
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new environment variable within a specified Service and Environment. Variables are key-value pairs used to store configuration data accessible to Functions and Assets in the environment. Requires the variable key and value in the request body. Returns the created Variable resource with its unique Sid, key, value, and metadata.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks context about what Variables are, their purpose, and what data is required/returned. Added domain context about Variables being configuration key-value pairs, clarified the scope (Service/Environment), specified required inputs, and described the response structure for better AI agent understanding.
